name: security-core
description: Cross-cutting security configuration for the Encore base app. Helmet/CSP, CORS, rate limiting, and structured logging are provided by apps/api/lib (security-headers, rate-limit, logger) and Encore's typed endpoints; body parsing is implicit in typed api() handlers. The Express session/body-parser/etag/pagination/correlation-id plugins and the session-store factory are retired (no apps/api/src/** tree under Encore; sessions removed by INV-3/INV-7). This module is now a thin declarative overlay documenting the CORS origin knob the base app's encore.app global_cors consumes.

CORS_ORIGIN.description: Allowed CORS origin(s), comma-separated; consumed by the base app's encore.app global_cors configuration
